essentials.alertRule: SQL Server Vulnerability Assessment - Auditing Disabled

properties.title: SQL Server Auditing is not enabled
properties.description: The SQL Server sqlserver-drift-test does not have auditing enabled. Server audit logs are critical for detecting anomalous activity, investigating breaches, and meeting compliance requirements (SOC2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA). Audit retention must be set to a minimum of 90 days per CIS Azure Benchmark 4.1.1.
properties.remediation: Add an azurerm_mssql_server_extended_auditing_policy resource with retention_in_days >= 90 and log_monitoring_enabled = true, targeting the existing storage account.
properties.complianceFramework: CIS Microsoft Azure Foundations Benchmark v1.3.0, NIST 800-53 AU-3, PCI-DSS Req 10.7
